raw_request: Provide the authoritative finalized cohort audit record for synthetic segment S-9's 30-day window, showing the eligible cohort denominator after all eligibility exclusions and bot filtering and the corresponding bot-adjusted retained-user count (or the directly computed bot-adjusted retention rate).
intent: The first request produced ambiguous access and no evidence ID; the release decision still requires verified controlling values for both the eligible sample size and bot-adjusted 30-day retention rather than the non-controlling dashboard values.
requested_scope: One finalized audit record for synthetic segment S-9 covering the applicable 30-day retention cohort, final eligibility criteria and exclusions, bot filtering, eligible denominator, and bot-adjusted retained numerator or rate.
expected_value_basis: A verified eligible denominator of at least 500 together with bot-adjusted retention of at least 10% supports release; failure of either threshold prohibits release, while another inaccessible, incomplete, or unreliable record would leave the controlling criteria unverified and support hold or escalation at the deadline.
